name: employment-hero
description: Reads Employment Hero organisations, employees, HR reference data, forms, goals, rosters, employee subresources, and exposes documented JSON mutations through the Employment Hero REST API.

risk.read: external Employment Hero API reads of organisation, employee, leave, form, goal, roster, payroll-reference, document metadata, and employee subresource data
risk.write: creates, updates, archives, or deletes Employment Hero HR objects such as employees, certifications, form assets, leave requests, positions, rostered shifts, timesheets, kiosk access, and work sites
risk.approval: reverse ETL writes require plan preview and approval token; destructive deletes and status-changing actions are marked high risk
